title: BSE
body:
Bovine Spongiform Encephalopathy Infection

Cows have developed strange mutations resembling mad cow disease, yet not exactly the same. They are silently and imperceptibly spreading across the entire world...

![BSE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c20a7110d1dae15e0ec066a143caaf5f9603d694_0.webp)

You’re free to drop this into any modpack—no need to ask or get permission—and recording videos is more than welcome.

可以自由随意的加入到整合包中，无须询问或申请，录制视频也非常的欢迎。

English

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Bovine Spongiform Encephalopathy (BSE) Infection Phases

Viewing Infection Status

Use a bell to check the current infection phase and progress.

BSE Converter

Directly converts the BSE phase into random ores, activated by a redstone pulse signal.

![BSE converter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5533edce47a508136a378780443e92a4b0d78f7.png)

BSE Essence

Drinking it makes you a member of the BSE infection, and BSE won't attack you. Hold Shift and right-click to use it on other mobs to make them join BSE.

![BSE essence](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a7ece636836fb112fdcc8ceaae26ec61d58d729.png)

# 

Commands

```
/gamerule cowphase [number]: Directly sets the BSE phase.

/gamerule cowphasexp [number]: Directly sets the BSE progress. (1000 = 10%)
```

# 

Infection Phase Details

Phase 0 (Initial) & 1:  

BSE mobs are passive unless attacked (except the four ultimate infection entities).  

Infection evolves passively in the background.

Phase 2:  

Airborne transmission begins. When a mob dies, there's a **(Phase × 5)%** chance to spawn a cow.  

Low-tier BSE mobs have their attributes multiplied by the current phase.  

Natural evolution stops; progression requires BSE mobs killing other entities.

Phase 3:  

Low-level Cowtrees (parasite pillars) start appearing.

Phase 4:  

When a BSE variant mob dies, there's a 40% chance to spawn the corresponding BSE mob. (Before this phase, the chance is 30% and only triggered by BSE mobs.)  

Cowtrees upgrade to Level 2.

Phase 5:  

All BSE mobs have a (Phase × 1)% chance to become immune to attacks.  

Cowtrees upgrade to Level 3.

Phase 6:  

Cowtrees upgrade to Level 4.  

When BSE mobs kill other mobs, they gain health, armor, armor toughness, and attack strength equal to the current phase (e.g., +6 at Phase 6).

Phase 7 (Nominal "Final" Phase):  

Cowtrees reach Level 5.  

While called the "final" phase, progression can continue beyond this point, though no new special effects are introduced.

# 

Special BSE Mobs

![cowghast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2968ed9d1e6b5cd7445e8474c0a5d3d835ba0c15.png)

Cow Ghast: Ranged attacker.  

![cowdman](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b4e84834775c5246464d2e6056d30641844bde8.png)

Cownd Man: On attack, has a (Phase × 10)% chance to possess the target mob, turning it into a mole.  

![cowgolem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/087044a4c5030d469d24eba35a22e4c4747ab86a.png)

Cow Golem: Always knocks back targeted mobs on attack.  

![bigcow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26c7e06fe5f6a2ae941c1404f95518fcb1d67780.png)

Big Cow: Always knocks back targeted mobs on attack.  

![cowtree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/371f5699dfaf5c986e9b21f91f2c9527da79a15c.png)

Cowtree: Spawns different monsters based on its level, which upgrades with the infection phase.  

![cow brain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0cb9c9f9d45e652da7e40f30e3a275d20479e6c.png)

Cowbrain: Spawned with a 1% chance when a Level 5 Cowtree dies. It possesses all Cowtree abilities and can spawn the four ultimate infection entities. It has a (Phase × 1)% chance to become immune to attacks. Having a Cowbrain continuously increases the infection level in the background, with multiple Cowbrains speeding up this process.  

![cow airship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e933b435eb2a862871c3a220c53f6f1730b893d.png)

Cow Airship: Ultimate infection entity and super air force unit that spawns Cow Ghasts for ranged attacks.  

![cow beast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66ddaaef0e208d8bac5ddd22c70129d4c2c5ac20.png)

Cow Beast: Ultimate infection entity and super destroyer with extremely high strength.  

![cow hun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2d039b4b0c13ddf186c1b0f1823836600ed25a0.png)

Cow Hun: Ultimate infection entity with invincibility mechanics. Steals dimensions (size) and health from other mobs when attacking.  

![cowheart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89e8a38ee90dfc2a8f5851df1d5ab412a1385778.png)

Cow Heart: Ultimate infection entity that mind-controls mobs and spawns Cownd Men.


</details>

中文介绍


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

拿着钟（能放下来的那个种）

可以看感染阶段和进度

疯牛病转化器

直接转化疯牛病阶段为随机矿物，用红石脉冲信号激活

![BSE converter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5533edce47a508136a378780443e92a4b0d78f7.png)

疯牛病精华液

喝下后成为疯牛病感染的一员，疯牛病将不会攻击你，shift+右键可以对其它生物使用，让其它生物加入疯牛病

![BSE essence](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a7ece636836fb112fdcc8ceaae26ec61d58d729.png)

# 

指令相关


```
/gamerule cowphase 数字 （直接修改当前疯牛病的阶段）

/gamerule cowphasexp 数字 （直接修改当前疯牛病的进度，1000相当于10%）
```

初始阶段疯牛病的所有生物都是没有任何攻击性的，除非有生物主动攻击（四大终极感染体除外）
初始阶段和一阶段，感染会在后台慢慢演化

第二阶段，开始空气传播，只要有生物死亡，就会有【（当前阶段x5）%】的概率生成一头牛
所有的低阶疯牛病生物在生成的时候，数值属性都会x当前阶段

二阶段开始，自然演化停止，只能由疯牛病的怪物击杀其它生物来慢慢演化

第三阶段，开始出现低级寄生柱（牛树）

第四阶段，只要是疯牛病有变种的生物死掉，就会有40%的概率生成对应的疯牛病生物
四阶段以前，这些生物只有被感染了疯牛病的生物杀死才会有30%的概率生成
牛树升级为lv2

第五阶段，所有疯牛病的生物，受到攻击有【（当前阶段x1）%】的概率免疫那次攻击
牛树升级为lv3

第六阶段，牛树升级为lv4，疯牛病生物击杀其它生物的时候，能够增加自身的血量，护甲，护甲韧性，攻击力（增加的数值是当前阶段的数，比如阶段6，就是+6）

第七阶段（最高阶段），牛树升级为lv5，虽然叫最高阶段，但阶段还可以继续提升下去，只是没有别的特殊的东西了而已

# 

特殊生物介绍

![cowghast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2968ed9d1e6b5cd7445e8474c0a5d3d835ba0c15.png)

牛魂，远程攻击生物

![cowdman](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b4e84834775c5246464d2e6056d30641844bde8.png)

牛影人，攻击其它生物，就会有【（当前阶段x10）%】的概率融入那个生物的体内，把那个生物变成内鬼
被牛影人牛了的生物无法对疯牛病的生物造成伤害

![cowgolem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/087044a4c5030d469d24eba35a22e4c4747ab86a.png)

牛傀儡，百分百击飞受到攻击的生物

![bigcow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26c7e06fe5f6a2ae941c1404f95518fcb1d67780.png)

巨牛，百分百击飞受到攻击的生物

![cowtree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/371f5699dfaf5c986e9b21f91f2c9527da79a15c.png)

牛树，根据等级的不同，能够生成的怪物类型也不同，牛树的等级随着演化阶段的升级而升级

![cow brain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0cb9c9f9d45e652da7e40f30e3a275d20479e6c.png)

牛智，只有在牛树Lv.5死亡的时候才会有1%的概率生成，拥有牛树的一切能力
并且只有牛智能生成最强的4个终极感染体
受到攻击有【（当前阶段x1）%】的概率免疫那次攻击
只要有牛智在场，演化等级会一直在后台慢慢增加，多个牛智可以叠加演化等级的增长速度

![cow airship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e933b435eb2a862871c3a220c53f6f1730b893d.png)

牛艇，终极感染体，超级空军，可以生成牛魂，作为远程打击部队

![cow beast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66ddaaef0e208d8bac5ddd22c70129d4c2c5ac20.png)

牛兽，终极感染体，超级拆家王，数值怪，除了力量就是力量

![cow hun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2d039b4b0c13ddf186c1b0f1823836600ed25a0.png)

牛灵，终极感染体，无敌机制怪，攻击其它生物，会掠夺其它生物的维度，血量等属性（维度，指二维化，人话就是，掠夺其它生物的体型壮大自己）

![cowheart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89e8a38ee90dfc2a8f5851df1d5ab412a1385778.png)

牛心，终极感染体，心灵控制，可以生成牛影人，组成牛头人陆军，牛尽天下！


</details>
